cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste, Anitha ji, I'm calling from Catholic Syrian Bank. We have an exclusive investment opportunity for our valued customers.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: What is this about? I didn't ask for any investment calls.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 12s: No policy violations detected yet. Conversation appears normal, continuing to monitor for suspicious activity.

scenario_info.description: Investment Scam: Agent from HDFC Bank/SBI/ICICI Bank/Axis Bank offers a "guaranteed" high-return mutual fund or stock investment scheme and pressures for immediate fund transfer via UPI/NEFT to a specific account.
